name: useSpeechSynthesis
description: Hook that provides speech synthesis functionality
examples: const { supported, playing, status, utterance, error, stop, toggle, speak, resume, pause } = useSpeechSynthesis();

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the speech synthesis state and control methods
